summary: 0.6.69 is the minimal spatial-audio slice: keep the current playback sandbox and transport intact, but route audio through a dedicated anchor at the hosted CUA root.
operatorSignals: The last remaining 0.6.x finish-up item before favorites was spatial audio.
The operator clarified that the audio source should sit at the hosted CUA root rather than at a world/runtime origin.
actionsTaken: Kept runtimeObject under runtimeRoot and did not move the playback sandbox.
Added a dedicated audio anchor for the AudioSource and parented that anchor to the hosted CUA root for hosted records.
Applied minimal spatial settings to that AudioSource while leaving transport, sync, slideshow, and plugin UI untouched.
nonGoals: No speaker/profile system in this slice.
No transport, sync, slideshow, or default-preset autoload changes.
